ab: bulabulai sun, anema a uri su velin?
en: A: Hello, what are you looking for?

ab: uri venli aken tu ita a kuppu.
en: B: I want to buy a cup.

ab: bulabulai sun, anema a uri su velin?
en: A: Hello, what are you looking for?

ab: uri venli aken tu ita a tjalupung.
en: B: I want to buy a hat.

ab: uri venli aken tua kuppu, paveliveli mun?
ch: A:我要買杯子，你們有賣嗎?
en: A: I want to buy a cup, do you sell them?

ab: izua, uri venli sun tu pida?
en: B: Yes, how many do you want to buy?

ab: paveliveli mun ta saviki?
en: A: Do you sell betel nut?

ab: neka, ini amen a paveliveli ta saviki.
en: B: No, we don’t sell betel nut.

ab: uri venli aken ta padai.
en: A: I want to buy rice.

ab: pida cavu a uri su velin?
en: B: How many packs do you want to buy?

ab: pavai aken tu tjelu a cavuan.
en: A: Give me three packs.

ab: uri venli aken ta vurasi.
en: A: I want to buy sweet potatoes.

ab: makapaveli anga ta vurasi.
en: B: All the sweet potatoes are sold out.

ab: uri venli aken tu tjanudrusa a abula.
en: A: I want to buy two bottles of oil.

ab: itanga a nia tjeza.
en: B: We only have one bottle left.

ab: sau velian aken ta qecilu.
en: A: Go buy me eggs.

ab: pida tjingtjing a uri su velin?
en: B: How many pounds do you want to buy?

ab: pida tjingting a qecilu a uri su velin?
en: A: How many pounds of eggs do you want to buy?

ab: uri venli aken tu 2 kuking.
en: B: I want to buy two catties.

ab: uri venli aken tu drusa djaljeng a ngigi.
en: A: I want to buy two green onions.

ab: izua tjelu a djaljeng imaza, nisunai anga a penuljat!
en: B: There are three left, all for you!

ab: pida aicu a tacavu a padai?
en: A: How much is this bag of rice?

ab: nu tacavu drusaitai.
en: B: $200 for a pack.

ab: drusa puluq sa ita a kinpiya, sandrusapuluq a kinpiya sakamaya.
en: A:The total is $21, just count $20.

ab: masalu.
en: B: Thank you.

ab: izua 95 a kinpiya imaza.
en: A: Here’s $95.

ab: ku pazuljuay anan a venli, padjaljun tu 100 kinpiya.
en: B: I’ll buy some more, and make up 100 yuan.

ab: 510 a kinpiya a penuljat.
en: A:All $510.

ab: paka 500 bulai?
en: B: Count me in for $500, okay?

ab: pazangal anga aravc aicu, maqati a madjuluin a pagalju?
ch: A:這個太貴了，可以算便宜一點嗎?
en: A: It’s too expensive, can you make it cheaper?

ab: ini a maqati, madjulu anga ravac aicu.
ch: B:不行，這個已經很便宜了。
en: B: No, this is already very cheap.

ab: uri ku alapen aicu a tacavu a alju.
en: A: I want this packet of cookies.

ab: 30 aicu a tacavu a alju, izua anan a zuma uri su veli?
ch: B:這餅乾30元，還需要別的東西嗎?
en: B: $30 for the cookies, anything else you need?
